title: Moon Shoot
description: The Moon Shot is a women's eyeglass frame that combines a universally flattering round silhouette with premium materials for a confident and stylish look.

title: Alian Optics
description: The ALAIN frames present a rectangular shape with a full-rim acetate construction, offering a clean and versatile design suitable for various occasions.

title: Emy Optics
description: The EMY frames showcase a subtle cat-eye shape, offering a feminine and elegant look. Crafted from lightweight materials for enhanced comfort.

title: Prada PR05UV
description: This frame is characterized by its black acetate construction, providing a classic and timeless appearance.

title: Prada PR57YV
description: It features a matte brown finish with a semi-rimless metal frame, offering a sleek and modern look.

title: Pitchman R
description: It features round lenses with a classic notch bridge, combining a timeless look with modern materials for enhanced comfort and durability.

title: Charlie
description: It featuring versatile designs like round or square lenses, suitable for various face shapes.

title: Taunt
description: Taunt eyeglass frame offers a blend of classic design and modern aesthetics, suitable for a variety of face shapes.

title: Aviator
description: Inspired by the iconic aviator style, these frames offer a teardrop lens shape with a thin metal frame, delivering a classic yet bold look.

title: New Clubmaster
description: These frames feature a combination of acetate and metal materials, delivering a retro yet modern look.

title: Fuel Line
description: The Fuel Line is a men's eyeglass frame that combines minimalist design with Oakley's renowned craftsmanship.

title: Side swept
description: The Oakley Side Swept eyeglass frame combines a flattering square-like shape with a modified cat-eye design, enhanced by elegant metal detailing for a modern aesthetic.

title: Bain Bridge
description: These eyeglasses maintain the pilot shape with metal frames, offering a sophisticated look suitable for various occasions.

title: Frank titanium
description: It Features a lightweight titanium frame, offering durability and comfort in a sleek design.

title: Voon
description: The Voon eyeglasses feature a semi-rimless, square frame design crafted from lightweight C5™ material, offering both durability and comfort.

title: Prada PR14UV
description: The Prada PR14UV-KJM1O1-52 eyeglasses are a part of Prada's Catwalk collection, embodying the brand's commitment to Italian design and craftsmanship.

title: Explorer V
description: The Ray-Ban Explorer V Optics (model RB6545) eyeglasses feature an irregular metal frame design, offering a modern and distinctive look.

title: Peyton
description: Peyton frames feature a modern square shape with a slight cat-eye flair, providing a contemporary twist to a classic design

title: Futurity
description: The Oakley Futurity eyeglasses are inspired by the popular Oakley Sutro sunglasses, featuring a bold rectangular shape that stands out.

title: WingFold EVS
description: The Oakley Wingfold™ EVS (model OX5115) eyeglasses are designed for those seeking a combination of lightweight comfort and modern aesthetics.

title: RB3734V Optic
description: The Ray-Ban RB3734V Optics eyeglasses feature a distinctive irregular metal frame design, offering a modern and stylish look.

title: RB5288 Optics
description: The Ray-Ban RB5288 eyeglasses are a classic full-rimmed frame crafted from injected acetate, featuring a straight browline, saddle bridge, and shark-fin arms, combining style and functionality.

title: Alden
description: Frames with this name might feature a classic and timeless design with rectangular or oval lenses and a sturdy bridge.

title: Brooke
description: Brooke have a feminine touch, potentially featuring soft curves, cat-eye shapes, or subtle decorative elements.
